examples: Stick kor draw flags of the countries on the map.
Trick kor treat what it will be? Wishing you a happy Halloween!
For right now you can combine this with your old-school Kor and make a sweet casual deck.
The KOR-fx product is platform-independent and works with any device that has an audio output.
